It’s the 4th of August 2026.

Last month you signed up to utilise Fable 5 via usage credits because it’s the leading frontier model of Anthropic.

Dario has been telling you how AI is doing your job already and if you don’t start using it then you’re destined for the permanent underclass.

You decided that enough is enough, you’re going to start utilising Fable 5 to automate aspects of your working life to catch up.

You automate your calendar, your meeting notes, your email priorities and response list.

You build a swarm of six sub agents that read everything you need to know about your industry and provide a detailed document for you every morning.

Wow.

You go to fill up gas, no money.

That’s weird? You’re not poor.

You make your way home and load up Fable to review your finances.

It won’t answer for you.

You then look at your token usage meter that you had enabled auto-reload on, it’s full and it hasn’t reloaded?

KNOCK KNOCK.

You think “wtf, I have a doorbell”

KNOCK KNOCK.

Oh what is it?

You go to the front door.

Bailiff’s.

With an invoice for your token usage.

$86700

You go to slam the door on them.

They put their foot on the door, and they show you a photo that they have permission to take valued goods from the property in the name of Dario.

You think out loud “who’s Dario?”

They tell you “Dario Amodei”

“What the hell? That AI guy? He made it sound like I’d lose my job if I didn’t start using Fable”

Yes, well her owns your house now.

“MY HOUSE?”

Yes, you read the terms & conditions when you signed them prior to Fable right?

tweets.text:
first 10 hours of using claude fable, mixed reactions - the model's fantastic at most things but unecessarily restrictive in this initial release: 

- this models BURNS through tokens, hit my limit within 2 hrs, had to pay for more usage

- its an amazing world simulator. crushes at building game engines, video games, nails visually stunning graphics unlike prior models

- really annoying usage restrictions prevent me from researching basic science blogs. the sandboxing needs to be loosened

- you can't even analyze anthropic's own system card for fable citing cyber security risks.

- creative writing is amazing (as its name suggests)

-  much less sycophantic / dumb-sounding vs opus.

- basic math exploration defaults to opus 4.8

im hoping anthropic loosens restrictions asap so the public can really test this models capabilities. think it has huge potential.
